description: Push notifications Session B: wire initDeepLink() on reading page init, skip-if-already-read-today guard in scheduleDailyReminder, locale-switch reschedule in common.js.
notes: Physical device QA still needed — simulator notification display is unreliable. Edge cases (permission denied, timezone change) deferred post-TestFlight. Spec said `loadLocalProgress` from progress.js — actual export is `getUserProgress`; substituted (no such function as loadLocalProgress exists). Locale reschedule placed at central toggle handler in initShell's navbar callback (the choke point that fires for both in-place and navigation switches). For navigation-mode locale switches (any page without an onLangToggle handler), the reschedule promise races the page unload and may not complete — reading.js's in-place toggle is the only reliable path today. Reliable cross-page rescheduling would need a per-page init-time `if (isEnabled()) scheduleDailyReminder(activeDict)` call; not in this session's scope.
